rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §29.0032, which governs qualifications for providers of dyslexia instruction. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A provider of dyslexia instruction to students with dyslexia and related disorders:
_note: No conflict; the rule text concerns dyslexia instruction provider qualifications and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
